title: An Act to Establish a Limit on the Interest Rate Charged for Revolving Loans
committee: Health Coverage, Insurance and Financial Services
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Mar 4, 2025
last_house_action: 1/14/2025 - The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
